title: phoebe nicobarica
intro: Phoebe nicobarica, also known as the Nicobar tree, is a deciduous tree species native to the Nicobar Islands in the Bay of Bengal. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phoebe nicobarica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems, while also exhibiting immunomodulatory and hepatoprotective effects. Herbal preparations of Phoebe nicobarica are made from its leaves, bark, and roots, and can be used to create teas, infusions, and extracts that are traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine.
